positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical composition featuring cosmic flora and fauna amidst an ethereal nebula. The main subject is a central cluster of abstract, bioluminescent geometric organisms integrated into the roots of giant, stylized trees. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette dominated by deep indigo, vibrant cyan, emerald green, and touches of glowing gold, designed for optimal screen printing. The overall aesthetic should blend Art Nouveau elegance with sacred geometry and deep space abstraction. The composition must have clean, defined silhouettes, strong contrast, and a central focus point, suitable for repeating or large-format apparel placement. Intricate line work and smooth, solid color blocking are paramount. Studio lighting, ultra-detailed, print-ready vector art, clean edge definition.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifact, watermark, text, signature, logo, cartoon, low detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poor composition, gradient wash, messy, photorealism, depth of field
